metadata.name: NetBox Virtual Machine
metadata.description: Registers a virtual machine in NetBox with cluster, site, and host device associations. Defines VM metadata including resource allocation and optional IPAM integration.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Registers a virtual machine in NetBox with cluster, site, and optional host device associations. Defines VM metadata including resource allocation and optional IPAM integration.

## How to Use
This template renders `main.tf` as a file.

1. Start with the provider, resource identifiers, and required input values for the infrastructure you want to manage.
2. Provide existing NetBox object names for cluster, optional site, and optional host device. The template resolves them through NetBox data sources before creating the VM.
3. Render the Terraform files and run terraform fmt, terraform plan, and terraform apply in the target workspace.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `resource_name`: Resource Name; optional; default: vm.

### Virtual Machine Configuration
- `vm_name`: Virtual machine name; required; default: server-name.
- `cluster_name`: Existing NetBox cluster name; required; default: cluster-name.
- `status`: VM status; optional; default: active; options: active, planned, staged, offline, decommissioning.

### Site Assignment
- `site_name`: Existing NetBox site name (leave empty to skip); optional.

### Host Device
- `device_name`: Existing NetBox device name for host assignment (leave empty to skip); optional.

### IP Address Management
- `ipam_enabled`: Enable IP address assignment; optional; default: false.
- `interface_name`: Network interface name; required; default: eth0.
- `primary_ip4`: Primary IPv4 address with CIDR notation; required.
- `dns_name`: DNS name for the IP address (leave empty to skip); optional.

### Resource Allocation
- `resources_enabled`: Specify resource allocation; optional; default: false.
- `vcpus`: Number of virtual CPUs; optional; default: 2.
- `memory_mb`: Memory allocation in MB; optional; default: 4096.
- `disk_gb`: Disk size in GB; optional; default: 50.

### Description
- `description_enabled`: Add VM description; optional; default: false.
- `description_text`: VM description; optional; default: Managed by automation.

### Dependencies
- `depends_on_enabled`: Enable resource dependencies; optional; default: false.
- `dependencies`: Comma-separated list of resource dependencies; optional.

### Lifecycle
- `lifecycle_enabled`: Enable lifecycle rules; optional; default: false.
- `prevent_destroy`: Prevent resource destruction; optional; default: false.
- `create_before_destroy`: Create replacement before destroying; optional; default: false.
- `ignore_changes`: Comma-separated list of attributes to ignore changes for; optional.

## References
- [NetBox](https://netboxlabs.com/)
- [Virtual Machine Resource](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/e-breuninger/netbox/latest/docs/resources/virtual_machine)
- [Cluster Data Source](https://github.com/e-breuninger/terraform-provider-netbox/blob/master/docs/data-sources/cluster.md)
- [Site Data Source](https://github.com/e-breuninger/terraform-provider-netbox/blob/master/docs/data-sources/site.md)
- [Devices Data Source](https://github.com/e-breuninger/terraform-provider-netbox/blob/master/docs/data-sources/devices.md)
